hooks.command: if [ ! -f CLAUDE.md ] || [ $(wc -c < CLAUDE.md) -lt 50 ]; then echo 'ONBOARDING NOT COMPLETE: This project has not been configured for Claude Code. Tell the user to run /onboarding before starting work.'; else echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'n/a')"; echo "Status: $(git status --short 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo 'clean')"; echo "Last commit: $(git log --oneline -1 2>/dev/null || echo 'none')"; fi
